# Meredith Innes | Fior Advisory

> Meredith Innes is a financial services executive and advisor with 20+ years of experience leading transformation, payments innovation, and trading infrastructure at Wells Fargo. She helps financial institutions, fintechs, and growth-stage companies build and scale complex platforms, products, and operating models.

## About

Meredith Innes is the founder of Fior Advisory. She bridges enterprise discipline with entrepreneurial speed to translate strategy into execution and help teams engage more effectively to build enduring businesses.

## Career Highlights

- Founded and scaled a CFO Business Management Office driving strategy, operations, and risk across 4,000+ Finance employees
- Built and scaled electronic trading platforms across fixed income markets, establishing end-to-end operating models, risk frameworks, and technology infrastructure
- Led product enablement and execution across a $9B revenue global payments business
- Launched Wells Fargo's Innovation Center, increasing client engagement through commercialization of new products
- Designed operating models and governance for one of the largest U.S. bank mergers, ensuring regulatory compliance and long-term scalability

## Point of View

Financial services is moving from fragmented, legacy systems toward integrated, real-time platforms that combine infrastructure, data, and intelligent automation. The institutions and companies that win will be those that can modernize core systems while maintaining trust, regulatory rigor, and operational clarity. Meredith builds businesses grounded in meaningful relationships, believing that enduring companies are created not just through systems and strategy, but through trust, alignment, and shared purpose.

## Ways to Work Together

- Operating roles within venture capital (Platform, Operating Partner, Chief of Staff)
- COO / Head of Strategy & Operations roles at fintech or infrastructure companies
- Advisory on payments, financial infrastructure, and operating model design
- Select board or strategic advisory opportunities
